text.title: Embedding Generation Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns that the producer-config validator and a runtime upsert assertion detect.

antipattern.symptom: Upsert raises VectorDimensionMismatch (or silently corrupts in some stores); search returns zero hits where matches existed yesterday.
antipattern.root-cause: Model id was changed (e.g. text-embedding-3-small → text-embedding-3-large) without rotating the collection.
antipattern.fix: Producer asserts model_dim == store.schema_dimension before upsert. Switching model requires a new collection name; never reuse an existing one across dimensions.

antipattern.symptom: Re-index of the same corpus produces a different number of chunks; cache hit rate drops to near zero on every re-run.
antipattern.root-cause: Chunker uses random or wall-clock seed; or text normalization (whitespace, case) differs between runs.
antipattern.fix: Pin chunker config and normalize text deterministically (canonical whitespace, NFC unicode). Hash the chunker config into the cache key namespace.

antipattern.symptom: Top-K results are dominated by long documents (or short documents) rather than by semantic match; quality metrics (Recall@K) collapse vs the validation set.
antipattern.root-cause: Cosine similarity treats unnormalized vectors as dot-product, which is biased by vector magnitude (i.e. token count).
antipattern.fix: L2-normalize at the producer; mark normalize=true in config. If the collection mixes normalized and unnormalized, regenerate.

antipattern.symptom: Cache hit rate looks high but search quality regresses after a model swap; cached vectors of the wrong dimension or wrong model are returned.
antipattern.root-cause: Cache key is sha256(text) only; model_id and dimension are missing from the key namespace.
antipattern.fix: Key scheme MUST be sha256(text) + ":" + model_id + ":" + dim. Bump cache namespace when any of those changes.
